finding.summary: Track contains 78% silence; all level and loudness metrics are heavily diluted and not representative of the actual signal.
finding.probable_cause: The track has long periods of silence (possibly at the beginning/end or rests), making up the majority of the 10-second capture.
finding.confidence_reason: Confidence is capped at low because audio.silence_fraction is 0.780.

evidence_refs.description: Measured fraction of the capture that is silent (value 0.78).

proposal.reason: Silence fraction of 0.78 exceeds the 0.75 threshold, making any proposed adjustment unsupported by the available measurements. A re-capture of the track's active audio is needed for reliable diagnosis.
